title: Front Office Manager - Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited:
Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited!
